properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v7 v8 v9 v8 v10 v8 v11

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are at home in my heart 'Cause You loved me right from the start When I was refusing (hey) Your love kept pursuing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now that I've tasted Your love My heart just can't get enough Jesus, You have me (hey) You have me completely

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's Your love in my heart running over, yeah Every day of my life, I'll draw closer, hey

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Such a perfect love Oh, You lift me higher (higher) Lighting up my way Everything is brighter (brighter) With You, everything is better (so much better) With You, I am right where I belong In this perfect love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: No matter what I go through Lord, I'll keep my eyes fixed on You 'Cause Jesus, You're faithful And You are able

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, it's Your love in my heart running over, yeah Every day of my life, I'm gonna draw closer to You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Such a perfect love Oh, You lift me higher (higher) Lighting up my way Everything is brighter (brighter) With You, everything is better (so much better) With You, I am right where I belong

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Now, every part of my heart is now open Make Your home in my heart, You are welcome, ooh, yeah

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Such a perfect love Oh, You lift me higher (higher) Lighting up my way Everything is brighter (brighter, ooh, Lord) With You, everything is better (so much better) With You, I am right where I belong In this perfect love
